race.comment: UK import BRINDAVAN (3) was backed off the map last start in a BM80 over this course and distance but couldn't pick up the in-form Noble Conqueror despite getting every chance. Where there's smoke there's fire - expecting him to put the record straight this time. RAF ATTACK (2) is a light of former days but has been well-found by punters at his last two. Let the rank and file down on each occasion but with winkers on today for the first time it might spark a revival. SO LONG FAREWELL (8) made it two wins from his last three runs when he led all the way to score convincingly over this course and distance in midweek company recently. Lightly raced four-year-old who should cope with this step up in grade. JUST FLYING (4) is fitter for two runs back from a spell and is looking for this sort of trip now.
